final_plan:
#Task1: Download historical sensor data for Chiller 9's Tonnage at the MAIN site for the week of 2020-04-27.
#Agent1: IoT Data Download
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: Historical sensor data for Chiller 9's Tonnage at the MAIN site from 2020-04-27 to 2020-05-04.

#Task2: Analyze the downloaded time-series data for Chiller 9's Tonnage to detect anomalies.
#Agent2: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: Anomaly detection results for Chiller 9's Tonnage in the specified time frame.

#Task3: Review the anomaly detection results to determine if there are any anomalies in Chiller 9's Tonnage.
#Agent3: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency3: #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: A work order or recommendation based on the anomaly detection results.
